dev_server: http://localhost:5173 (run: cd jtfasulo-website && npm run dev)

deployment.build_command: cd jtfasulo-website && npm install && npm run build
deployment.note: Project lives in subdirectory — vercel.json at repo root handles routing

design_system.border_radius: rounded-xl for buttons/inputs, rounded-2xl for cards and images
design_system.headline_size: clamp(2.8rem, 8vw, 7rem) for hero; clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem) for sections
design_system.button_style: rounded-xl with cyan glow on hover; outline variant with border-white/20

Header.description: Sticky nav, transparent until scrolled 40px then bg-background/90 + backdrop-blur
Header.logo: Text only — 'JT Fasulo' in white semibold, no icon
Header.mobile: Hamburger menu with full-screen slide-in overlay
Header.animation: Slides down from y:-80 on mount

Hero.description: Full-screen landing section with fluid canvas grid and animated headline
Hero.headline: AI-Powered / Campaign / Creatives (each word on its own line)
Hero.headline_interaction: Each word slides right 8px on hover; 'Campaign' also brightens gradient
Hero.background: hero-gradient CSS class (radial cyan glow at top)
Hero.orbs: 3 floating blurred orbs with float animation
Hero.scroll_indicator: Vertical line + SCROLL text at bottom center

FluidGrid.description: Canvas-based fluid simulation that physically displaces grid lines based on mouse input
FluidGrid.behavior: Mouse movement spawns expanding pressure waves. Each wave displaces grid vertices via Gaussian bell function centered on wavefront. Cursor continuously parts grid lines outward (cubic falloff). Ripples travel full screen width before fading.
FluidGrid.mouse_events: Attached to window, checks if cursor is within hero bounds

Services.description: 4 service cards in 2-column grid (1 col on mobile)
Services.animation: Slide in from left (even) or right (odd) on scroll

Portfolio.description: Video portfolio grid — 4 real client videos displayed in 9:16 portrait frames
Portfolio.grid: 2 columns on md+, 1 column on mobile
Portfolio.autoplay_strategy: IntersectionObserver at 40% threshold — calls video.play() on enter, pause() on leave. Works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome. autoPlay + muted + playsInline + preload=auto attributes set on video element.

Process.description: 5-step vertical timeline: Discovery → Strategy → Creation → Optimization → Results
removed_sections: Typical Engagement Timeline box at bottom
Process.animation: Each step fades + slides up; connector lines scale in from top

About.description: Split layout — portrait photo left, bio + credentials + tech stack right
About.photo_style: Grayscale default, color on hover, rounded-2xl corners
bio: I'm JT Fasulo — creative technologist and brand strategist at the intersection of AI and high-performance marketing.
Work started in mechanical engineering, early vision that generative AI is the defining shift in creative production.
Today helps brands harness AI-powered creative systems for premium, scalable campaigns.
Deep in latest AI models, testing new tools, sharing with brand partners.
credentials: 150+ hours spent using agentic AI systems
Over 100,000 views generated on my own page in the first 50 days
About.credentials_header: REMOVED — no label above the bullet points

Contact.description: Lead capture form + contact info sidebar
Contact.submit_action: Opens mailto:jtfasulo7@gmail.com with subject and body pre-filled from form fields

Footer.description: CTA bar + nav/services columns + social icons + copyright
Footer.logo: Text only — 'JT Fasulo', no icon (matches header)
Footer.background_text: FASULO in giant near-invisible text behind footer

removed_sections: Testimonials section (entire component removed from App.jsx)
Stats row in Hero (150+ Campaigns Delivered, 3.2x Engagement Lift, etc.)
Performance metrics at bottom of Portfolio cards (ROAS, follower counts)

files.src/App.jsx: Root component — renders Header, Hero, Services, Portfolio, Process, About, Contact, Footer. Testimonials removed.
files.src/index.css: Global styles — Tailwind directives, custom classes (btn-primary, btn-outline, form-input, card-hover, text-gradient, hero-gradient, grid-overlay, grid-overlay-animated, orb, divider)
files.vite.config.js: Vite config with server.host: true for LAN mobile access
files.vercel.json: Deployment config at REPO ROOT — sets build command, output dir, SPA rewrites
files.website_memory.json: This file — living documentation of all changes

change_log.change: FluidGrid: added touchmove/touchend event listeners — touch drag on mobile now creates identical ripple effect as mouse on desktop
Hero: headline (AI-Powered / Campaign / Creatives) now continuously floats up/down 10px over 6s loop with easeInOut — premium idle animation
All sections: scroll reveal transitions upgraded — added blur(8px)→blur(0px) + y offset with 1.0–1.1s duration and earlier viewport trigger margins (-30 to -40px)
Initial build — full site created with all sections
Header: removed diamond logo, text-only 'JT Fasulo'
Testimonials section removed entirely from App.jsx
Portfolio: replaced 6 Unsplash image cards with 4 real client videos in 9:16 frames
Hero: fixed 'Campaign' text overflow (removed overflow-hidden, added pb-2)
Process: removed Typical Engagement Timeline box
About: replaced tech stack with Claude/Claude Code/Nano Banana Pro/Kling 3.0/Meta Ads/ElevenLabs
Contact: form submits via mailto to jtfasulo7@gmail.com
Hero stats row removed (150+ campaigns etc)
Portfolio metrics removed from card bottoms
Rounded corners applied globally — buttons rounded-xl, cards/images rounded-2xl
Hero hover animation — each headline word slides right 8px; Campaign brightens
About photo replaced with provided headshot (jt-fasulo.jpeg)
FluidGrid canvas component created — full fluid simulation replacing CSS grid
FluidGrid presence radius reduced to 35, glow radius to 120, ripple maxRadius set to 2000 (full screen)
About bio updated — mechanical engineering origin, generative AI vision
About credentials header removed; 3 new stat-based bullets added
Contact email updated to jtfasulo7@gmail.com (displayed + mailto)
Mobile responsiveness pass — vite host:true, footer logo cleaned, hero padding, contact budget grid
vercel.json added at repo root to fix 404 deployment from subdirectory
Portfolio videos: switched to IntersectionObserver autoplay (40% threshold) — fixes mobile tap-to-play requirement
